ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with ORIGINAL and COPY versions. Page 1 is ORIGINAL, Page 2 is COPY. Using ORIGINAL for verification.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, 3 pages. Invoice issued by AB Volvo Penta.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The reference 'VP48979200' in the remarks field is a shipment number, not an LC reference. No bankterms context (L/C, Letter of Credit, Documentary Credit) found anywhere in the certificate.

locations_found: Invoice page 1: Legal Company Address Reg.No block 'AB Volvo Penta, Gropegårdsgatan 11, 40508 Göteborg, Sweden'
Invoice page 1: Tax ID/Tax Agent block 'AB Volvo Penta, Gropegårdsgatan 11, 40508 Göteborg, Sweden'
Invoice page 1: Mu Office info,Address block 'AB Volvo Penta, Gropegårdsgatan 11, 40508 Göteborg, Sweden'
Invoice page 2: all footer blocks repeat AB Volvo Penta
Invoice page 3: all footer blocks repeat AB Volvo Penta

pairing_validation.motivation: All three pairing criteria are met: (1) Certificate references invoice 61622310/1S dated 2026-02-26, which matches the invoice number and date in the invoice file. (2) Certificate consignor 'AB Volvo Penta' is identifiable as the invoice issuer. (3) Certificate consignee 'Khonaysser Motors Sarl' is identifiable in the invoice's Consignee, Invoice Address, and Customer Address fields.

candidates.source: Invoice page 1, Legal Company Address Reg.No block
Invoice page 1, Legal Company Address block
Invoice page 1, Legal Company Address block
Invoice page 1, Description of Goods field
Invoice page 1, Total Gross Weight field
Invoice page 1, Total Net Weight field
Invoice page 2, Origin column for item 40869784
Invoice page 3, Origin column for item 23338316 (both rows)
Invoice page 1, Qty of Package and Type field
Invoice page 1, VP Sales Order No/Type field

consignor.certificate_value: AB Volvo Penta, Gropegårdsgatan 11, SE-405 08, Gothenburg, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: AB Volvo Penta, Gropegårdsgatan 11, 40508 Göteborg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'AB Volvo Penta' in invoice
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 'AB Volvo Penta' found as invoice issuer in Legal Company Address block, Tax ID/Tax Agent block, Mu Office info block, and VOLVO PENTA branding in header on all pages.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'AB Volvo Penta'. Invoice: 'AB Volvo Penta'. Exact match after normalization.
Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'Sweden' (Legal Company Address block). Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure - consignor name found in invoice issuer blocks

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'AB Volvo Penta' at 'Gropegårdsgatan 11, SE-405 08, Gothenburg, Sweden'. Invoice issuer is 'AB Volvo Penta' at 'Gropegårdsgatan 11, 40508 Göteborg, Sweden'. The company name is an exact match. The address differs only in postal code format (SE-405 08 vs 40508) and city name spelling (Gothenburg vs Göteborg), which are minor format differences for the same city. Country is 'Sweden' in both documents. VAT number SE556034133001 confirms SE (Sweden) prefix. MATCH.
consignor.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'AB Volvo Penta' är identiskt i certifikat och faktura. Adressen avser samma plats (Gropegårdsgatan 11, Göteborg/Gothenburg). Landet Sverige bekräftas i båda dokumenten. Exakt matchning utan normalisering av kärnuppgifter.

consignee.certificate_value: Khonaysser Motors Sarl, P.O. Box 702, ANTELIAS, Lebanon
consignee.invoice_value: Khonaysser Motors Sarl, P.O. Box 70268, ANTELIAS 0000, Lebanon

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has both Invoice Address and Consignee fields. Both contain 'Khonaysser Motors Sarl'. Checking primary billing field first.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice Address field contains 'Khonaysser Motors Sarl' - primary billing field match found.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Khonaysser Motors Sarl'. Invoice Invoice Address: 'Khonaysser Motors Sarl'. Invoice Consignee: 'Khonaysser Motors Sarl'. Invoice Customer Name: 'Khonaysser Motors S.A.R.L'. Name matches exactly in Invoice Address and Consignee fields. Customer Name uses 'S.A.R.L' instead of 'Sarl' which is a standard legal form variation.
Certificate: 'Lebanon'. Invoice: 'Lebanon' (in Invoice Address, Customer Address, and Consignee blocks). Exact match.

Certificate P.O. Box 702 vs Invoice P.O. Box 70268. The P.O. Box numbers differ. However, per rule 4.2.4, differences in address details do not in themselves constitute MISMATCH when company name and country match.
comparison_steps.result: Address difference noted but not determinative per 4.2.4

rules_applied.description: Priority order - Invoice Address (primary billing field) used
Name verification - exact match in billing and consignee fields
Address differences do not constitute MISMATCH when name and country match
Legal form abbreviation - 'Sarl' and 'S.A.R.L' are equivalent forms of Société à Responsabilité Limitée

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Khonaysser Motors Sarl' at 'P.O. Box 702, ANTELIAS, Lebanon'. Invoice has 'Khonaysser Motors Sarl' at 'P.O. Box 70268, ANTELIAS 0000, Lebanon' in Invoice Address, Customer Address, and Consignee fields. The Customer Name on page 2-3 is 'Khonaysser Motors S.A.R.L' (legal form variation - Sarl vs S.A.R.L is acceptable per 4.1.3.6). Company name 'Khonaysser Motors' is identical. Country 'Lebanon' matches exactly. The P.O. Box number differs (702 vs 70268) but per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not constitute MISMATCH when company name and country match. MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Mottagarnamnet 'Khonaysser Motors Sarl' är identiskt i certifikat och faktura (Invoice Address, Customer Address och Consignee-fält). Landet Libanon stämmer överens. Postboxnumret skiljer sig (702 vs 70268) men detta påverkar inte bedömningen då företagsnamn och land matchar.

goods_description.certificate_value: Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories / See attached invoice 61622310/1S, dated 2026-02-26
goods_description.invoice_value: Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories (Description of Goods, page 1) / Invoice No 61622310/1S, Date 2026-02-26

comparison_steps.description: Certificate does not contain specific article numbers (no item codes like the ones in the invoice's detail lines). Certificate uses a general goods description. Proceeding to Priority 2.
comparison_steps.result: Not applicable - no article numbers in certificate

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories'. Invoice Description of Goods (page 1): 'Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories'. Exact text match of the identity-bearing main designation.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.5 Priority 3 - Generic goods with invoice reference
comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains explicit reference 'See attached invoice 61622310/1S, dated 2026-02-26'. Invoice number 61622310/1S matches exactly. Invoice date 2026-02-26 matches exactly. This provides additional verification.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - invoice reference and date confirmed

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - exact match of identity-bearing main designation
Generic goods with invoice reference - invoice number and date confirmed

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description is 'Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories' with explicit reference to 'attached invoice 61622310/1S, dated 2026-02-26'. The invoice's 'Description of Goods' field on page 1 states 'Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories' — an exact text match. Additionally, the invoice number 61622310/1S and date 2026-02-26 match exactly. Both Priority 2 (text match) and Priority 3 (invoice reference) are satisfied. The invoice detail pages show this covers TAD1341-43GE-B Industrial diesel engines and Screw and spacer kits, which are consistent with the general description. MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: Varubeskrivningen 'Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories' är identisk i certifikat och faktura. Certifikatets fakturareferens '61622310/1S, dated 2026-02-26' överensstämmer exakt med fakturans nummer och datum.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains 'G.W 13937.00 KG'. This is the verification-basis quantity. Box 6 also mentions '18 Pallets' as package type (supplementary information).
comparison_steps.result: Box 7 value 'G.W 13937.00 KG' selected as verification-basis

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: G.W 13937.00 KG. Invoice page 1: 'Total Gross Weight 13937.00 KG'. Exact numeric match: 13937.00 = 13937.00. Unit: KG = KG. Weight category: GW (Gross Weight) matches 'Total Gross Weight'.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - exact numeric value, unit, and weight category match

comparison_steps.description: Invoice also shows Total Net Weight 12894.75 KG. Certificate only states GW, does not state NW. No contradiction — NW is additional information in the invoice that is not stated in the certificate.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 quantity used as verification basis
Direct identification - exact match of numeric value in invoice
Weight category verification - GW matches Total Gross Weight

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states 'G.W 13937.00 KG'. Invoice page 1 states 'Total Gross Weight 13937.00 KG'. The numeric value 13937.00 is an exact match. The unit KG is identical. The weight category GW (Gross Weight) corresponds to 'Total Gross Weight'. The invoice also states Total Net Weight 12894.75 KG which is not stated in the certificate — this is additional information, not a contradiction. MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certifikatets bruttovikt G.W 13937.00 KG överensstämmer exakt med fakturans 'Total Gross Weight 13937.00 KG'. Numeriskt värde, enhet och viktkategori är identiska.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice page 2-3 contains an 'Origin' column. All article rows show 'SE' as origin: item 40869784 (TAD1341-43GE-B) = SE, item 23338316 (Screw and spacer kit, 2 rows) = SE. 'SE' is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden.
comparison_steps.result: Origin identified as 'SE' for all items

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'SE'. Normalization: 'SE' is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden. These are equivalent after standard country name normalization.
All items in the invoice show the same origin 'SE'. Single origin country, consistent with certificate's 'Sweden'.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice's dedicated Origin column
Normalization - ISO alpha-2 code SE = Sweden
Uniform origin - all items show same origin

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'Sweden' as country of origin. The invoice contains a dedicated 'Origin' column on pages 2-3. All article rows show 'SE' (ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden). Item 40869784 (TAD1341-43GE-B Industrial diesel engine): Origin = SE. Item 23338316 (Screw and spacer kit, 2 rows): Origin = SE. After normalization, 'SE' = 'Sweden'. All origins are uniform and match the certificate. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Sweden' bekräftas av fakturans Origin-kolumn som visar 'SE' (ISO-landskod för Sverige) för samtliga artikelrader.

rule_evaluation_log.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. VP48979200 is a shipment number.

Certificate file contains ORIGINAL (page 1) and COPY (page 2) of same certificate SEG-26D-464599. Using ORIGINAL. Invoice file contains 3-page invoice 61622310/1S from AB Volvo Penta. No ambiguity in pairing.
All three criteria met: invoice reference 61622310/1S matches, consignor AB Volvo Penta identifiable, consignee Khonaysser Motors Sarl identifiable.
AB Volvo Penta found as invoice issuer in multiple blocks.
Exact name match: AB Volvo Penta.
Invoice Address field (primary billing) contains Khonaysser Motors Sarl. Used as primary match target.
Khonaysser Motors Sarl matches across Invoice Address, Consignee, and Customer Name fields.
P.O. Box 702 (cert) vs P.O. Box 70268 (invoice) — address difference does not constitute MISMATCH per 4.2.4 when company name and country match.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.motivation: Exact text match: 'Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories'.
Invoice reference 61622310/1S and date 2026-02-26 confirmed. Explicit 'See attached invoice' phrase present.
G.W 13937.00 KG matches Total Gross Weight 13937.00 KG exactly.
Dedicated 'Origin' column found on invoice pages 2-3 with value 'SE' for all items.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: P.O. Box number discrepancy (702 vs 70268) indicates different consignee
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.2.4, differences in postal address (street, P.O. Box number, postal code) do not constitute MISMATCH when the company name and country match. The company name 'Khonaysser Motors Sarl' is identical in both documents and the country Lebanon matches. The P.O. Box difference may be a transcription issue (702 could be an abbreviation or older box number) but is not relevant for the MATCH/MISMATCH determination.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Legal form difference S.A.R.L vs Sarl indicates different entity
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.1.3.6, differences in legal form abbreviation/formatting (Sarl vs S.A.R.L.) are permitted variations. Both refer to Société à Responsabilité Limitée. Company core name 'Khonaysser Motors' is identical.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: City name spelling Gothenburg vs Göteborg indicates different address for consignor
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Gothenburg is the English name for Göteborg. This is a standard city name variation between English and Swedish. Rule 4.1.5 states that differences in address details do not constitute MISMATCH when company name and country match.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren AB Volvo Penta, mottagaren Khonaysser Motors Sarl, varubeskrivningen 'Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories', bruttovikten 13 937,00 KG och ursprungslandet Sverige kan alla verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary_of_findings: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor AB Volvo Penta matches exactly. Consignee Khonaysser Motors Sarl matches in name and country (minor P.O. Box variation noted but non-determinative). Goods description 'Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories' is an exact text match supported by verified invoice reference. Gross weight 13937.00 KG matches exactly. Country of origin Sweden verified via 'SE' in invoice Origin column for all items.
non_blocking_observations: P.O. Box number differs between certificate (702) and invoice (70268) for consignee. Not determinative per rules.
Certificate contains both ORIGINAL and COPY versions. ORIGINAL used for verification.
City name variation: Gothenburg (certificate) vs Göteborg (invoice) — standard English/Swedish variation.

sections.invoice_value: AB Volvo Penta, Gropegårdsgatan 11, 40508 Göteborg, Sweden

sections.invoice_value: Khonaysser Motors Sarl, P.O. Box 70268, ANTELIAS 0000, Lebanon (Invoice Address)
sections.rule_applied: Namnmatchning i primärt faktureringsfält (Invoice Address). Adressskillnad påverkar inte bedömningen.
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Khonaysser Motors Sarl' är identiskt i certifikatet och i fakturans Invoice Address, Customer Address och Consignee-fält. Landet 'Lebanon' matchar. Postboxnumret skiljer sig (702 vs 70268) men detta påverkar inte bedömningen enligt reglerna.

sections.invoice_value: Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories / Invoice No 61622310/1S, Invoice Date 2026-02-26
sections.rule_applied: Exakt textmatchning av varubeskrivning samt verifierad fakturareferens och datum.
sections.motivation: Varubeskrivningen 'Industrial Diesel Engine & Accessories' är ordagrant identisk i certifikat och faktura. Fakturanummer 61622310/1S och datum 2026-02-26 överensstämmer exakt med certifikatets hänvisning.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt identifiering – exakt numeriskt värde, enhet och viktkategori

sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Sweden' verifieras mot fakturans Origin-kolumn som anger 'SE' för samtliga artikelrader. SE är ISO alpha-2-koden för Sverige. Alla artiklar har samma ursprung.

human_readable_report.overall_result: IDENTICAL – Samtliga kontrollpunkter matchar. Dokumentparet rekommenderas för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All five applicable checkpoints are MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.97. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW on any checkpoint. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent with all checkpoints being MATCH. Confidence floor (0.85) satisfied for all checkpoints.
